_metadata.note: MSRP hardware estimates only. WatchGuard Firebox requires a Basic Security Suite (BSS) or Total Security Suite (TSS) subscription. Datto requires a cloud backup subscription. Contact Yeyland Wutani LLC for current partner pricing.

key_features: WatchGuard Cloud management
2.5 GbE WAN port for fiber/cable ISP links
Integrated IPS, App Control, WebBlocker
SD-WAN and multi-WAN failover
SFP/SFP+ port for fiber uplink
firewalls.best_for: Small offices and branch locations up to 30 devices

key_features: Integrated Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) tri-band radio
WatchGuard Cloud management
2.5 GbE WAN + SFP/SFP+ for flexible uplinks
Integrated IPS, App Control, WebBlocker
SD-WAN and multi-WAN failover
firewalls.best_for: Small offices needing combined firewall and Wi-Fi 7 up to 30 devices

key_features: 4x PoE+ ports — directly power APs, cameras, or phones
WatchGuard Cloud management
Dual SFP uplinks for fiber or redundancy
Integrated IPS, App Control, WebBlocker
SD-WAN, BGP routing, VLAN segmentation
Optional 4G LTE module bay
firewalls.best_for: Growing SMBs and multi-VLAN environments up to 75 devices

key_features: 1U rack-mountable desktop form factor
WatchGuard Cloud management
Full UTM suite: IPS, AV, App Control, WebBlocker
SD-WAN, BGP/OSPF routing
Supports up to 5 VLANs with proper segmentation
firewalls.best_for: Medium offices and multi-site deployments up to 150 devices

key_features: Dual 10G SFP+ uplinks
WatchGuard Cloud management
Full UTM suite with AI-powered threat detection
SD-WAN, BGP/OSPF, policy-based routing
WatchGuard TDR and DNSWatch integration
firewalls.best_for: Larger offices and headquarters up to 250 devices

key_features: 10G SFP+ and 1G copper interfaces
WatchGuard Cloud management
Full UTM suite with advanced threat protection
High availability (active/passive clustering)
SD-WAN with intelligent path management
firewalls.best_for: Large organizations and data center edge up to 500 devices

key_features: High-density 10G interfaces
WatchGuard Cloud management
Enterprise-grade HA and failover
Advanced threat intelligence and correlation
Full SD-WAN with SLA-based path selection
firewalls.best_for: Enterprise environments and multi-site hubs up to 1000 devices

key_features: Full PoE+ on all 24 ports
4x 10G SFP+ uplinks
L3 routing: static, OSPF, RIP
Aruba Central cloud management
802.1X port authentication and dynamic segmentation
switches.best_for: Offices needing full PoE coverage, L3 routing, or advanced VLANs

key_features: Full PoE+ on all 48 ports (740W budget)
4x 10G SFP+ uplinks
L3 routing and dynamic segmentation
Aruba Central cloud management
802.1X and MAC-based authentication
switches.best_for: Large offices with high PoE demand across 50-100 wired devices

key_features: Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) tri-radio for concurrent coverage
2.5 GbE uplink port — no throughput bottleneck
Aruba Instant On cloud management
WPA3 and OWE encryption
Band steering, load balancing, and Smart Mesh
access_points.best_for: Standard indoor coverage — recommended for most office deployments

key_features: Wi-Fi 6E with dedicated 6 GHz band — less congestion
2.5 GbE uplink for maximum throughput
Aruba Instant On cloud management
WPA3 encryption and Enhanced Open (OWE)
Ideal for dense wireless environments
access_points.best_for: High-density deployments, conference centers, and 50+ concurrent wireless users

key_features: IP67 weatherproof rating for outdoor installation
Aruba Instant On cloud management
WPA3 encryption
Wide-coverage antenna for open outdoor spaces
Suitable for warehouses, parking lots, outdoor seating
access_points.best_for: Outdoor wireless coverage for yards, parking areas, or warehouses

key_features: Instant local and cloud virtualization
Screenshot-based backup verification
Ransomware detection and rollback
Datto RMM integration
Automated backup testing — verified recovery
backup_appliances.best_for: Single-server small offices needing BCDR with < 2 TB of protected data

key_features: Instant local virtualization — spin up protected servers in seconds
Screenshot-based backup verification
Ransomware detection with point-in-time rollback
Datto Cloud secondary off-site copy included
Full BMR (bare metal restore) for physical and virtual servers
backup_appliances.best_for: 1-3 server environments with up to 5 TB of protected data

key_features: Instant local virtualization for multiple servers simultaneously
Screenshot-based automated recovery verification
Ransomware detection and isolated recovery environment
Off-site Datto Cloud replication with infinite retention
Datto RMM and PSA integrations for MSP management
backup_appliances.best_for: 3-8 server environments with 5-15 TB of protected data

key_features: High-capacity local storage for large server environments
Run multiple virtualized servers locally during an outage
Automated screenshot verification for all protected systems
Datto Cloud infinite retention for compliance requirements
Priority support and dedicated recovery manager option
backup_appliances.best_for: 8-20 server environments or those with 15-30 TB of protected data

key_features: Enterprise-scale local storage with expansion capability
Simultaneous instant virtualization of all protected systems
Automated boot-time and screenshot verification
Datto Cloud with dedicated bandwidth and SLA options
Multi-site replication and centralized management console
backup_appliances.best_for: Large environments, multi-server data centers, or > 30 TB protected

security_software.authentication_methods: Push, TOTP, QR code, hardware tokens
security_software.integrations: WatchGuard Firebox, RADIUS, SAML 2.0, Azure AD, ADFS
key_features: One-tap push MFA for VPN, RDP, and cloud app logins
Native WatchGuard Firebox integration — no RADIUS server needed
SAML 2.0 federation for Microsoft 365, Salesforce, and 100+ apps
Risk-based auth with location and device DNA fingerprinting
Phishing-resistant hardware token option available
security_software.best_for: Organisations with VPN, RDS/RDP, or cloud apps requiring secure MFA

key_features: Zero-Trust Application Service — only verified processes run
AI-powered behavioral analysis and threat hunting
Ransomware rollback and automatic process remediation
Full EDR: process tracing, attack timelines, endpoint isolation
Unified WatchGuard Cloud console alongside Firebox management
security_software.best_for: Replacing consumer or free AV with enterprise EDR across all endpoints

key_features: Exchange Online — hosted email, no on-prem mail server needed
Microsoft Teams — chat, video, file sharing and collaboration
SharePoint & OneDrive — replaces on-premises file server
Entra ID (Azure AD) — cloud identity, replaces on-prem domain controller
Web-only Office apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
cloud_services.best_for: Small offices (under 15 users) needing cloud email, Teams, and storage without desktop Office apps

key_features: Full desktop Office suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
Exchange Online — 50 GB hosted mailbox per user
Teams with meeting recordings and webinar hosting
SharePoint & OneDrive — 1 TB cloud storage per user
Entra ID — cloud identity replaces on-premises Active Directory
cloud_services.best_for: Growing SMBs needing full Office desktop apps, cloud email, and Teams collaboration

key_features: All Business Standard features included
Microsoft Defender for Business — enterprise-grade EDR for all endpoints
Intune — cloud device management (MDM/MAM), replaces on-prem GPO management
Entra ID P1 — Conditional Access, MFA, self-service password reset
Microsoft Purview — data loss prevention and compliance tools
cloud_services.best_for: Security-conscious SMBs or those with compliance needs — the most complete SMB cloud platform

key_features: Replaces on-premises Remote Desktop Services (RDS/terminal server)
Windows 11 multi-session — multiple users per VM at fraction of RDS cost
Apps and desktops stream from Azure — no thick client compute required
Microsoft 365 Apps included with eligible M365 Business/Enterprise licenses
Scales automatically — provision or deprovision VMs in minutes
cloud_services.best_for: Environments with an aging RDS or terminal server — migrate remote access to Azure for better security, scale, and cost control

servers.processor: Intel Xeon E-2400 series or Pentium G7400 (2-8 cores, 1 socket)
servers.memory_type: DDR5 UDIMM (4 slots, up to 4400 MT/s)
key_features: Compact tower — fits under a desk or in a closet
DDR5 memory for modern workload efficiency
iDRAC10 out-of-band remote management
Energy-efficient Xeon E-2400 processor
Tool-free chassis access
servers.best_for: Single-server small office: file/print, domain controller, or lightweight VM host

servers.processor: Intel Xeon E-2400 series or Pentium G7400 (2-8 cores, 1 socket)
servers.memory_type: DDR5 UDIMM (4 slots, up to 4400 MT/s)
key_features: Tower form factor — no rack required
DDR5 memory for future-ready performance
Up to 8 hot-plug 3.5" drives for generous local storage
iDRAC10 remote management with full lifecycle tools
OpenManage with proactive health alerting
servers.best_for: SMB primary server: domain controller, file services, or Hyper-V host without a rack

servers.processor: Intel Xeon 6 Performance (4-8 P-cores) or Xeon E-2400 series (1 socket)
servers.memory_type: DDR5 UDIMM (4 slots, up to 4400 MT/s)
key_features: 1U rack footprint — maximises rack density
DDR5 memory with Xeon 6 or E-2400 processor options
iDRAC10 with KVM-over-IP remote management
Hot-plug drives and redundant PSU option
PCIe Gen4 expansion for networking or GPU offload
servers.best_for: Rack-based SMB primary server: directory services, file services, or lightweight virtualization

servers.processor: Intel Xeon 6 E-core (up to 144 cores) or P-core (up to 86 cores, 1 socket)
servers.memory_type: DDR5 RDIMM (16 slots, up to 6400 MT/s)
key_features: Intel Xeon 6 processor — up to 144 cores in 1U
Up to 4 TB DDR5-6400 RDIMM for massive in-memory workloads
10x hot-plug NVMe drives for ultra-high IOPS
iDRAC10 Enterprise with AI-assisted predictive health
PCIe Gen5 + BOSS-N1 M.2 boot for clean OS separation
servers.best_for: Dense virtualization host, database server, or AI-inferencing workload consolidation

servers.processor: 2x Intel Xeon 6 (up to 2x 144 E-cores or 2x 86 P-cores)
servers.memory_type: DDR5 RDIMM (32 slots, up to 6400 MT/s)
key_features: Dual-socket Xeon 6 — up to 288 cores in 2U
Up to 8 TB DDR5-6400 RDIMM for large-scale virtualisation
Flexible NVMe + SAS/SATA tiered storage bays
iDRAC10 Enterprise with full lifecycle automation
Dual redundant hot-swap PSU and cooling
servers.best_for: Primary virtualisation platform, mission-critical workloads, or high-density multi-tenant compute
